## Prince

```{r }
sto:::ll("sto dplyr")
```
```{r }
book <- epubr::epub("dev/pg1232-images.epub")
book <- book[["data"]][[1]]
book[,"n"] <- 1:nrow(book)
book |> dplyr::filter(section == "item38") |> dplyr::pull("text")
book |> dplyr::filter( )

prince <- book[8:36,]

prince <- prince |> select(text) |> 
  mutate(
    title = stringr::str_extract(text, ".*\\n") |> gsub2("\\n+$"),
    text = stringr::str_remove(text, ".*\\n+")) |>
  select(title, text)
ex_prince <- prince
save(ex_prince, file = "data/ex_prince.rda")

```
```{r devtools use data}
usethis::use_data(ex_prince, overwrite = TRUE)
```
